'''gajusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xigua|xigua]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xigua|xigua]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gajusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæjisith|gæjisith]] || [[word:gæjisij|gæjisij]] || [[word:gæjisish|gæjisish]] || [[word:gæjisi|gæjisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajujusuth|gajujusuth]] || [[word:gajujusuj|gajujusuj]] || [[word:gajujusush|gajujusush]] || [[word:gajujusu|gajujusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajusuth|gajusuth]] || [[word:gajusuj|gajusuj]] || [[word:gajusush|gajusush]] || [[word:gajusu|gajusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajufsuth|gajufsuth]] || [[word:gajufsuj|gajufsuj]] || [[word:gajufsush|gajufsush]] || [[word:gajufsuf|gajufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gajusuthu|gajusuthu]] || [[word:gajusuju|gajusuju]] || [[word:gajusushu|gajusushu]] || [[word:gajusuku|gajusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gajusuth|gajusuth]] || [[word:gajusuj|gajusuj]] || [[word:gajusush|gajusush]] || [[word:gajusu|gajusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gajusuthul|gajusuthul]] || [[word:gajusujul|gajusujul]] || [[word:gajusushul|gajusushul]] || [[word:gajusukul|gajusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gajusuthuthu|gajusuthuthu]] || [[word:gajusujuju|gajusujuju]] || [[word:gajusushushu|gajusushushu]] || [[word:gajusuku|gajusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gajusuthun|gajusuthun]] || [[word:gajusujun|gajusujun]] || [[word:gajusushun|gajusushun]] || [[word:gajusukun|gajusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gajusuthuoro|gajusuthuoro]] || [[word:gajusujuoro|gajusujuoro]] || [[word:gajusushuoro|gajusushuoro]] || [[word:gajusukuoro|gajusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
